---
title: "Probabilistic Machine Learning: Gaussian Processes, Bayesian Neural Networks, and Beyond"
subtitle: "SCIML-003 | Track D — Scientific ML"
description: "Machine learning methods that quantify uncertainty. Essential for scientific applications where knowing what we don't know is as important as prediction."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Probabilistic Machine Learning: Gaussian Processes, Bayesian Neural Networks, and Beyond

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
